title: Package-registry richness (was jssm#869)
manager: Enrich the package-registry presence — npm keywords, a JSR listing, and schema.org JSON-LD metadata (was jssm#869). It's the SEO of package discovery: the right keywords and structured metadata are what make FSL surface when someone searches the registries, and JSON-LD is what lets machines (search and AI) understand what the package is.
